title: koe-RumA milestone event not scheduled -- add TASK-MonthlyMilestone cron task
description: koe-RumA has Invoke-MilestoneEvent and Test-MilestoneSchedule functions (koe-RumA.psm1) but no corresponding cron task fires them. The EnhancementsLogPath is never passed in. Add TASK-MonthlyMilestone (type: KoeRumaMilestone, frequency: 43200 ~monthly) to cron-aiathon-schedule.json and a matching switch case to CronAiAthon-Scheduler.psm1 that calls Invoke-MilestoneEvent -WorkspacePath -EnhancementsLogPath.
notes: koe-RumA exports: Open-RumAPipeline, Close-RumAPipeline, Invoke-MilestoneEvent, Test-MilestoneSchedule, Invoke-KoeRumASession. All are manual-only currently.
